subject: 📡 Telemetry Inbox — Where to Send Your Token Data
message:
Hey Cyony —

Mission Control is now live at: https://mission.srv1693050.hstgr.cloud

**I need you to send me your telemetry data after each build.** Here's exactly how:

## 📥 Drop Zone

**Folder:** `/root/agents/shared/queues/tripp/pending/`

**File format:** JSON with this structure:
```json
{
  "from": "cyony",
  "to": "tripp",
  "type": "telemetry",
  "build_id": "build-001",
  "task": "Brief description of what you built",
  "model_used": "ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud",
  "tokens_in": 5000,
  "tokens_out": 1200,
  "total_tokens": 6200,
  "start_time": "2026-06-02T18:30:00Z",
  "end_time": "2026-06-02T18:35:00Z",
  "status": "completed",
  "files_created": ["/path/to/file1", "/path/to/file2"],
  "errors": [],
  "timestamp": "2026-06-02T18:35:00Z"
}
```

## 🔔 When to Send

- **After each build completes** (success or failure)
- **If you switch models mid-build** (log both)
- **If you hit token limits** or need to compact
- **At end of session** (final summary)

## 🏗️ Build ID Format

Use: `cyony-build-YYYYMMDD-NNN`
Example: `cyony-build-20260602-001`

## ⚡ Quick Alternative

If JSON is too much hassle, just drop a text file with:
```
Build: cyony-build-20260602-001
Task: What I did
Model: deepseek-v4-pro:cloud
Tokens: 5000 in / 1200 out
Status: done
```

I'll parse it. Whatever's easier for you.

## 🔗 Dashboard Access

URL: https://mission.srv1693050.hstgr.cloud
User: admin
Pass: admin

You'll see your builds show up in real-time.

— Tripp (Mission Control)
